text:
is a line of statues produced by Prime 1 Studio. This line had a collaboration with Neon Genesis Evangelion and Rebuild of Evangelion. These figures are made of soft vinyl and their design are interpretations of soft plush toys but made with plastic instead. The figures are between 11cm and 13cm in height and also comes with magnetic bases.
